2362850.name: The Chronicles of Eleos: The Hall of Azaron Demo
2362850.description:
Embark on a journey across the magical continent of Eleos!


The continent is full of mysteries just waiting to be unreavel by someone curious enough

You are the Wizard!

As a archeologist wizard you shall seek the secrets from the past in old ruins across the continent. In this demo you get to explore in full the prologue and the first chapter of five we have planned for you, so get your staff and be prepared because you are going on a adventure!
